name: Polenta Pie (from My Garden)
recipeIngredient: 4 cups boiling water or vegetable stock
recipeInstructions:
1. In a double boiler, whisk the polenta into boiling water, stirring often to prevent lumping.
2. Cover and steam for 30 minutes on low heat until the cornmeal is softened.
3. Stir in the corn, rosemary, and cheese.
4. Spread the mixture into an 8-inch greased springform pan, pressing it with a spoon to move the mixture up the sides of the pan, forming an empty shell.
5. Allow the shell to cool and harden.
6. Grill all vegetables. Season them with salt and pepper.
7. Layer the grilled vegetables and chopped basil in the pie shell in a decorative pattern.
8. Chill and unmold. Serve at room temperature.
